dialogue: {userName}, Pembroke, Leonard, Harold. Interrogation room. Now.
That a nuclear missile is waiting in a secret launch site.
He is not. I dismissed him years ago after finding early plans for exactly this weapon.
The best part is that you understand the maths and still cannot stop the clock.
The clock is the end distance.
And this clock is very generous.
*the team regroups in the control room with every screen searching for the launch site*
We have almost no data. I will search anyway.
Prepare for another strike while Rick works.
Standard missile, not the nuke. End distance: {endDistance}. They want us blind before launch.
Then we stay alive long enough to find the real threat.
